
### AddressSanitizer stack layout 



::: {.r-stack .my-full}
![](/bounds/texfig/asan-stack-layout.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/bounds/texfig/asan-stack-layout.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/bounds/texfig/asan-stack-layout.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::
